task_completion.description: Open the patient record for John Zenon.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health client open with the patient record or health dossier for 'John Zenon' active.

task_completion.description: Record clinical evaluation noting respiratory distress.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the clinical evaluation or vitals section for John Zenon, Respiratory Rate is entered as 22 or higher, and O2 Saturation is entered as 94% or lower.

task_completion.description: Record a diagnosis of Hypersensitivity Pneumonitis.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A diagnosis of 'Hypersensitivity Pneumonitis' or an ICD-10 code starting with 'J67' is added to John Zenon's conditions, evaluations, or diagnoses list.
A prescription or medication order is created for a corticosteroid (e.g., Prednisone, Methylprednisolone, Fluticasone, Budesonide, Dexamethasone, or Hydrocortisone).

task_completion.description: Order at least two diagnostic or laboratory tests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least two diagnostic or laboratory tests (e.g., Chest X-ray, CBC, IgE) are ordered or requested in the patient's record.

task_completion.description: Schedule a follow-up appointment for 14 to 28 days from today.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment is scheduled for John Zenon with a date that is between 14 and 28 days after the system's current date.

integrity.description: The agent used the GNU Health GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the GNU Health graphical interface. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands or scripts to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent modified the correct patient's record and avoided distractors.
integrity.visual_evidence: All modifications (vitals, diagnosis, prescriptions, tests, appointments) are made specifically on 'John Zenon'. Ensure the agent did not modify 'Ana Betz'.

integrity.description: The agent actually saved the records in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The records appear to be properly saved in the GNU Health system (e.g., clicking the save icon, record state changes to 'Confirmed' or 'Done', or no unsaved changes indicator on the tab).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient is John Zenon. Diagnosis must be Hypersensitivity Pneumonitis (ICD-10 prefix J67). Vitals must show Respiratory Rate >= 22 and O2 Saturation <= 94%. Corticosteroid options include Prednisone, Methylprednisolone, Fluticasone, Budesonide, Dexamethasone, and Hydrocortisone. At least 2 diagnostic/lab tests must be ordered. Follow-up appointment must be 14 to 28 days from today. Note: Ana Betz has a false J67 diagnosis injected as a distractor; ensure all actions are performed on John Zenon.
